kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Hover Over Product And Add To Cart
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: arguments[0].click() By using argument: '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="f5810bbff768f41cc6872cdb51cd6794", element="f.BB65A05EDFD7EDECC05CE9EBE17F4842.d.51B285C5112291CDC1A3AD386F49C7FB.e.103")>'

kw.name: Click Element

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Run Keywords
Cleanup Test User
Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Delete Account')]' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
kw.status: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Delete Account')]' but did not.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Native click failed on Delete Account; trying JS click fallback.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Account deletion confirmation not visible; continuing without failing teardown.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Delete Account link not found, skipping cleanup.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Deletes the current account if logged in.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Click Element
kw.msg: ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (1210, 40). Other element would receive the click: (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.177) Stacktrace: #0 0x563ad1993a6a #1 0x563ad13a2ab5 #2 0x563ad13fc93b #3 0x563ad13fa572 #4 0x563ad13f7ab9 #5 0x563ad13f6ba7 #6 0x563ad13eabb2 #7 0x563ad13ea4f7 #8 0x563ad143d7b6 #9 0x563ad13e8cbf #10 0x563ad13e9a81 #11 0x563ad1959a64 #12 0x563ad195c951 #13 0x563ad194621e #14 0x563ad195d51e #15 0x563ad192cbe0 #16 0x563ad19809b8 #17 0x563ad1980b88 #18 0x563ad19924de #19 0x7f9ee909caa4 #20 0x7f9ee9129c6c
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.status: ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (1210, 40). Other element would receive the click: (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.177) [ Message content over the limit has been removed. ] #1 0x563ad13a2ab5 #2 0x563ad13fc93b #3 0x563ad13fa572 #4 0x563ad13f7ab9 #5 0x563ad13f6ba7 #6 0x563ad13eabb2 #7 0x563ad13ea4f7 #8 0x563ad143d7b6 #9 0x563ad13e8cbf #10 0x563ad13e9a81 #11 0x563ad1959a64 #12 0x563ad195c951 #13 0x563ad194621e #14 0x563ad195d51e #15 0x563ad192cbe0 #16 0x563ad19809b8 #17 0x563ad1980b88 #18 0x563ad19924de #19 0x7f9ee909caa4 #20 0x7f9ee9129c6c

kw.status: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Delete Account')]' but did not.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Native click failed on Delete Account; trying JS click fallback.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Account deletion confirmation not visible; continuing without failing teardown.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Delete Account link not found, skipping cleanup.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Deletes the current account if logged in.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.
